title: KAG Canada Deploys IFSâ€™ Hydrogen-Fueled Class 8 Heavy-Duty Truck in Commercial Operations
content: KAG Canada and Innovative Fuel Systems (IFS) announced that KAG Canadaâ€™s commercial operation is successfully using a hydrogen dual-fuel-powered heavy-duty (HD) truck powered by IFSâ€™  patented Multi-Fuel Technology Platform (MFTPâ„¢). MFTPâ„¢ is a retrofit system that can be used on existing HD trucks, allowing a diesel engine to offset diesel fuel usage with cleaner burning fuels like natural gas (in the form of CNG) or renewable natural gas (RNG), and IFSâ€™ new MFTPâ„¢ model can incorporate hydrogen fuel, providing HD fleets with an additional cleaner burning fuel option.
author: Analysts Account
